home.disclaimer: The information on this website is for educational purposes only and cannot replace diagnosis or advice from a physician or physical therapist.

disease.advisoryText: These exercises are for informational purposes only. Please consult a physical therapist before starting, especially if you have severe symptoms or have already been diagnosed.
